_meta.note: Synthetic commit history. Each commit hash IS its source_id.

commits.author: Marcus Chen
commits.message: feat(orders): add order_tags table and index for tagging
commits.diff_summary: Adds the order_tags table and an index to speed up tag filtering: `CREATE INDEX idx_orders_tag_id ON orders(tag_id);`

commits.author: Marcus Chen
commits.diff_summary: Drops idx_orders_tag_id and recreates it with `CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_orders_tag_id ON orders(tag_id);` per migration guidelines. No table lock.

commits.author: Elena Rodriguez
commits.message: feat(payments): call fraud-check before authorizing payment
commits.diff_summary: In authorize(): calls `fraudClient.score(order)` and uses the returned risk score before authorizing the payment.

commits.author: Elena Rodriguez
commits.message: fix(payments): make fraud-check async with 150ms timeout + fallback
commits.diff_summary: Wraps fraudClient.score in a 150ms timeout; on timeout, fail open and queue an async review. Removes fraud-check from the blocking auth path.

commits.author: Sam Okoro
commits.diff_summary: Batches stock-updates Kafka messages for throughput. Unrelated to the June incidents.

commits.author: Marcus Chen
commits.message: feat(checkout): in-memory cache for product lookups
commits.diff_summary: Adds a package-level `var productCache = map[string]Product{}`. On each product lookup, returns the cached Product if present, otherwise loads it and stores it in productCache.

commits.author: Aisha Khan
commits.message: feat(auth): record an audit-log entry on every login
commits.diff_summary: In the login() handler, after verifying credentials, adds `await db.insert('audit_log', {...})` to record the login, then returns the session.
